title: Work Session Checkpoint and Usage Playbook
manual_review: Existing managed docs are not rewritten. Use the new checkpoint policy only for future event-triggered minimal writeback.
If either target already exists with different content, safe apply preserves it and reports skipped-existing-review-needed.
non_goals: No Project Capsule Bootstrap, automatic docs split, real capsule creation, or Repo Lite generation
No chat-history scan, automatic compact detection, background writeback, runner, daemon, or scheduler
No automatic Git commit, tag, push, PR, repository, artifact, or archive movement
